headline: Ariel Global Fund Exited Eversource Energy (ES) After Operational Headwinds and Weakening Key Indicators
summary: Ariel Investments, an investment management company, released its “Ariel Global Fund” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Ariel Global Fund delivered solid results in 2025, rising +23.30% for the year and outperforming both the MSCI ACWI and MSCI ACWI Value indices, although it lagged benchmarks in the fourth […]
